title: HeartbreakerPvP
description: This Minecraft Paper plugin causes players to lose a heart each time they're killed by another player, and once all hearts are lost, they are either set to spectator mode or banned, based on the server's configuration.
body:
# PvP Heart System Plugin

This plugin introduces a unique PvP mechanic where players start with 3 hearts, and each time they are killed by another player, they lose one heart. When all hearts are depleted, the player will either be set to spectator mode or banned, based on the server configuration.

## Features
- Players start with 3 hearts by default.
- Lose a heart with each PvP death.
- Configurable actions when hearts reach 0: 
  - Spectator mode.
  - Ban the player from the server.
- Customizable heart count and consequences through the config file.

## Installation
1. Download the plugin jar file.
2. Place it into your server's `/plugins/` folder.
3. Start or restart your server to generate the configuration file.
4. Customize the settings in the config file to fit your server's needs.

Feel free to report bugs or suggest improvements!
